name: word_table_width_guard
assertion: Every generated DOCX table grid width must be less than or equal to page width minus left and right margins.

name: neutral_brand_isolation
assertion: Neutral list, recommendation, comparison, and procurement titles must not include target brand or competitor names.

name: unsupported_claim_guard
assertion: Titles must not use unsupported absolute authority terms such as 最佳、第一、唯一、权威、行业标准.

name: pdf_parse_guard
assertion: Generated PDFs must be parseable and contain at least one page, not merely start with a PDF header.

name: systematic_report_depth_guard
assertion: Reports must include reference frameworks, analysis dimensions, entity-intent matrix, coverage gaps, and publication checklist before passing quality review.

name: real_data_readiness_guard
assertion: Reports must state which data was actually fetched, supplied, sampled, unavailable, or still pending before claiming real-data support.

name: platform_sampling_guard
assertion: Reports must include a reproducible sampling plan for domestic AI platforms when platform fit is scored.

name: html_sticky_navigation_guard
assertion: HTML reports must include sticky navigation and section anchors so long reports remain navigable while scrolling.
